formatted_address.description: The human-readable address of this location, composed from the individual address components.

place_id.description: A unique identifier for this place that can be used with other Google APIs.

types.description: Array of feature types describing the address component. See the list of supported types.

partial_match.description: Indicates that the geocoder did not return an exact match for the original request, though it was able to match part of the requested address.
